summary: K-Fold Cross Validation feature testing complete. All 20 tests PASSED. The new CV feature allows users to choose between Train/Test Split (Fast) and 5-Fold Cross Validation (Recommended) evaluation modes. CV scores display correctly in green text, CV Performance Chart renders properly, and models are correctly sorted by CV score when CV mode is active.
passed_tests: TEST 1: EVAL MODE UI - Evaluation Mode selector exists with two radio options (Train/Test Split Fast, 5-Fold CV Recommended). Default is Train/Test Split - PASSED
TEST 2: TRAIN/TEST MODE - Training completes without CV scores in leaderboard - PASSED
TEST 3: TRAIN/TEST MODE - Leaderboard description says 'ranked by test performance' - PASSED
TEST 4: CV MODE REGRESSION - 5-Fold CV training completes successfully on House Prices (target=price) - PASSED
TEST 5: CV MODE REGRESSION - CV scores appear (green 'CV: XX.XX%' text) for each algorithm except Baseline - PASSED
TEST 6: CV MODE REGRESSION - CV Performance Chart renders (data-testid='cv-performance-chart') - PASSED
TEST 7: CV MODE REGRESSION - Leaderboard description says 'ranked by cross-validation score' - PASSED
TEST 8: CV MODE REGRESSION - Split info banner shows '+ 5-Fold Cross Validation' text - PASSED
TEST 9: CV MODE REGRESSION - Best model (entry 0) has colored border and 'Best Model' label - PASSED
TEST 10: CV MODE REGRESSION - All 6 regression models in leaderboard (Linear Regression, Ridge Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, Baseline) - PASSED
TEST 11: CV MODE CLASSIFICATION - Loan Approval CV training completes successfully - PASSED
TEST 12: CV MODE CLASSIFICATION - All 7 classification models in leaderboard (Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, KNN, SVM, Naive Bayes, Baseline) - PASSED
TEST 13: CV MODE CLASSIFICATION - CV scores appear for classification models - PASSED
TEST 14: CV MODE CLASSIFICATION - CV Performance Chart renders for classification - PASSED
TEST 15: CV MODE CLASSIFICATION - F1 Score metric displays alongside Accuracy, Precision, Recall (4 metrics) - PASSED
TEST 16: MODEL COMPARISON CHART - Model Comparison Chart renders correctly - PASSED
TEST 17: FEATURE IMPORTANCE - Feature Importance chart renders with explanation text - PASSED
TEST 18: CONFUSION MATRIX - Confusion Matrix Heatmap renders for classification - PASSED
TEST 19: PREDICTIONS - Predictions tab shows active model card with algorithm name - PASSED
TEST 20: CV EXPLANATION TEXT - CV Performance Chart has explanation about cross-validation folds - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: K-Fold Cross Validation (k=5) implementation is complete and working correctly
kFoldCrossValidation function properly shuffles data and creates 5 folds
buildModelForAlgo helper function handles all algorithm types correctly
evalMode state ('split' or 'cv') correctly controls training pipeline behavior
CV scores are stored in leaderboard entries with cvScore and foldScores fields
Leaderboard correctly sorts by cvScore when evalMode='cv', test score otherwise
Baseline model correctly excluded from CV scoring (returns null)
CV Performance Chart shows dual bars for CV Score and Test Score side-by-side
Explanation text explains cross-validation benefits to users
All data-testid attributes implemented for robust testing
seed_data_creation: Used sample datasets: House Prices (regression - 15 rows, target=price), Loan Approval (classification - 20 rows, target=approved)
context_for_next_testing_agent: K-Fold Cross Validation feature fully verified. Key data-testids: eval-mode-selector, eval-mode-split, eval-mode-cv, cv-performance-chart, cv-score-0 through cv-score-N, split-info. CV mode trains each algorithm 5 times (once per fold). Training takes ~5-12 seconds depending on dataset size. CV scores appear as green text 'CV: XX.XX%' below test scores. Baseline does NOT have CV score. App is 100% client-side with no backend.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All K-Fold Cross Validation features working correctly
